meta.title: Create AI Animated Stories With ONE prompt - NEW AI Animation Generator
meta.description:
Learn How To Make AI Animated Stories with One Prompt
Try OpenArt 👉 https://openart.ai/home?ref=aistoryboard

With just one prompt you can now easily create AI Animation Videos, AI music videos and AI Explainer videos! In this video I teach you how to Make your Own AI Animated Story easily with the help of OpenArt. They just released this new feature and all you need to do is just use one prompt and you can have cool looking animations.

Try out AI Storyboard here  👉 https://openart.ai/home?ref=aistoryboard

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
